tasks.label: install-composer-and-phpmailer
args: "copy('https://getcomposer.org/installer', 'composer-setup.php');"; php composer-setup.php; php composer.phar require phpmailer/phpmailer

tasks.label: bootstrap-composer-and-install-phpmailer
args: Set-Location 'C:\xampp\htdocs\TiranaSolidare'; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://getcomposer.org/installer' -OutFile 'composer-setup.php'; php composer-setup.php; php composer.phar require phpmailer/phpmailer
